title: Feature collection metadata sidecar
description: CLAUDE.md §12 provenance + license/coverage sidecar for a sibling non-electoral GeoJSON FeatureCollection (e.g. power plants, healthcare facilities). GeoJSON (RFC 7946 §7.1) reserves all top-level members; rather than muddle the artifact, a sibling `<file>.metadata.json` carries the required `sources`, `license`, `coverage`, and `coordinate_system` on its behalf. Mirrors boundary.sources.schema.json but extends it with license/coverage/CRS for non-electoral feature data.

x-changelog.description: Initial schema. Sidecar shape (for, sources, license, coverage, coordinate_system). Created for the energy/power-plants ingest (TODO/SOCIO-ECONOMIC-EXPANSION.md Phase B). Adopts the india-geodata metadata vocabulary (D3) without breaking existing boundary sidecars.

Additive: optional file-level `simplification` object {tolerance_deg, algorithm, original_feature_count, retained_feature_count, original_vertex_count?, retained_vertex_count?}. Surfaces geometry-simplification metadata so downstream area/length math is not silently lying. Required by the TN granular-geo pipeline (TODO/TN-GRANULAR-GEO-PLAN.md Phase 0) for per-district village boundary GeoJSONs whose geometries are simplified at write time to meet the 8 MB gzipped per-file budget. Existing v1.0 sidecars re-validate unchanged.

Additive: broaden simplification.algorithm enum with `coord-precision-round`. tools/boundaries/snapshot.py applies coordinate rounding (round-then-dedupe-consecutive) at emit time; this is neither Douglas-Peucker, Visvalingam, nor a shapely topology-preserving simplification — naming it honestly avoids overclaiming the algorithm semantics downstream consumers infer. Pure enum widening — every v1.1 sidecar still validates.

for.description: Basename of the sibling GeoJSON this sidecar describes (e.g. "power-plants.geojson").

title.description: Human-readable title for the dataset (e.g. "Power Plants of India, 2019").

description.description: One-paragraph human description, suitable for surfacing in the UI.

category.description: Top-level category (e.g. "energy", "healthcare", "education"). Used by the frontend layer rail.

sources.description: Provenance per CLAUDE.md §12 / ADR-0002, extended additively per D3 (TODO/SOCIO-ECONOMIC-EXPANSION.md) with optional name + authority for human attribution.

name.description: Optional human-readable name of the upstream (e.g. "Installed Capacity Report 2019").

authority.description: Optional issuing authority (e.g. "Central Electricity Authority, Ministry of Power").

license.description: License the dataset is published under. `Unspecified` is a valid label per D9 — surface it; do not hide.

id.description: Canonical short id. Prefer SPDX (`CC0-1.0`, `CC-BY-4.0`, `ODbL-1.0`). Use `IndiaOGL` for India OGL (no SPDX entry). Use `Unspecified` when the upstream did not state a license.

redistributable.description: true: bytes may be bundled. false: must link out (NC, etc.). null: license unknown — bundling allowed but flagged in the UI.

admin_level.description: Lowest administrative level the data is meaningful at (`country`, `state`, `district`, `subdistrict`, `point`, or null when not applicable).

coordinate_system.description: EPSG identifier of the coordinate reference system. Default and overwhelmingly common: EPSG:4326. Declare even if default — explicit beats implicit.

simplification.description: Optional. Records geometry-simplification applied at emit time. Required when the producer simplified geometry (e.g. to meet a per-file size budget) so downstream area/length math is not silently lying. Absent = no simplification applied or none recorded. Per TODO/TN-GRANULAR-GEO-PLAN.md Phase 0 (Hans v2 nit).

tolerance_deg.description: Simplification tolerance in degrees (WGS84). Typically 1e-5 to 1e-3.

algorithm.description: Simplification algorithm applied. `shapely-preserve-topology` denotes shapely.simplify(..., preserve_topology=True). `coord-precision-round` denotes coordinate rounding to N decimal places followed by consecutive-duplicate elision (tools/boundaries/snapshot.py); not topology-aware but predictable in geometric error magnitude (≤ tolerance_deg).

original_feature_count.description: Feature count before simplification (after any LGD-join filtering).

retained_feature_count.description: Feature count in the emitted file. Equals original_feature_count when simplification only changes vertices, not feature count.

original_vertex_count.description: Optional. Total coordinate count before simplification.

retained_vertex_count.description: Optional. Total coordinate count in the emitted file.
